initial_program:
output(R2, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0, R2 = #count{ R0 : input(R0, C, Color0), Color0 != 0, R0 <= R }.
occupied(R, C) :- output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
output(R, C, 0) :- true, not occupied(R, C).
:- output(R, C, 0), occupied(R, C).
#show output/3.
